items.title: Fall 2025: First Day of Classes
items.description: Classwork begins at 8:00 a.m. This is the official start of the Fall 2025 semester.

items.title: Fall 2025: Labor Day Holiday
items.description: No classes. University is closed in observance of Labor Day.

items.title: Fall 2025: Thanksgiving Recess Begins
items.description: Recess begins at close of day (includes evening classes). Classes resume Monday, December 1.

items.title: Fall 2025: Last Day of Classes
items.description: Classwork ends at close of day. Reading Day follows on Friday, December 12 — no classes or exams.

items.title: Fall 2025: Final Exams
items.description: Final examinations period. Semester officially closes Friday, December 19.

items.title: Fall 2025: Commencement
items.description: Graduation ceremonies for Fall 2025 degree candidates.

items.title: Spring 2026: First Day of Classes
items.description: Classwork begins at 8:00 a.m. Note: MLK Holiday is January 19 — no classes that day.

items.title: Spring 2026: Spring Recess
items.description: Recess begins at close of day March 21. Classes resume Monday, March 30.

items.title: Spring 2026: Last Day of Classes
items.description: Classwork ends at close of day. Reading Day is Friday, May 8 — no classes or exams.

items.title: Spring 2026: Final Exams
items.description: Final examinations period. Semester officially closes Friday, May 15.

items.title: Spring 2026: Commencement
items.description: Graduation ceremonies for Spring 2026 degree candidates.

items.title: myZou Student Portal
items.description: Register for classes, pay tuition, view your transcript, accept financial aid, and manage your student account.

items.title: Canvas Learning Management System
items.description: All course syllabi, assignments, grades, and announcements are posted here by professors.

items.title: Academic Advising
items.description: Each college has its own advising office. Schedule appointments through Navigate360. Advisors help with degree planning, registration, and declaring a major.

items.title: Add/Drop & Withdrawal Deadlines
items.description: Specific add/drop and withdrawal deadlines vary by course length. After the drop deadline a 'W' appears on your transcript. Check the full Dates & Deadlines document for exact dates.
